title: euploca scabra
intro: Euploca scabra, also known as the rough euploca or rough plowshare plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Euploca scabra include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
